data.name: InfiniTease
data.detailed_description:
You've walked this before.

Same lockers. Same lights. Same girl adjusting her hair in the mirror

at the far end. Totally normal. Nothing to worry about.

...wait. Was she standing there last time?

InfiniTease is a first-person anomaly game that knows exactly

what you're thinking — and rewards you for it. Walk the same loop,

floor after floor, and try to keep your eyes where they belong.

Something always changes. The question is whether you'll be honest about

what caught your attention first.

The Rules Are Simple. You Won't Follow Them.

Spot something unusual? Turn back. That's it. That's the game.

If the corridor is normal — walk forward. If something has changed —

walk away. Reach final without slipping up, and the exit is yours.

But something always feels different.

And InfiniTease has 30+ very good reasons to make you stop and stare.

Choose Your Playstyle, Darling

The Disciplined Route — Run to Win

Eyes forward. Jaw tight. Pretend you didn't notice. Reach final floor

and unlock the true ending and it best for players who actually behaved.

For a while.

The Honest Route — Activate to Collect

See something interesting? Step closer. Find out what happens.

We understand. We planned for that.

Every "mistake" unlocks a new scene.

The game resets you. You will not care.

The exit is eight floors away.

How far do you really think you'll get? 😉

data.short_description: Something always changes. Something always tempts. Walk forward if everything looks normal — turn back if it doesn't. Reach final floor and escape... or get curious, and let it show you exactly what you've been missing.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 日文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
